text_original: it's very very good but few things are not good like it has fixed massage for free for unlimited you have to take subscription + it not use bad language of family like, step sis, stepmom, aunt etc.
text_zh: 它非常非常棒，但有几点不太好，比如免费消息额度是固定的，想要无限额度必须订阅；另外它不使用家庭成员类的粗俗语言，比如继妹、继母、阿姨等。
reply_original: Hi! We're thrilled you're enjoying Fantasia. Regarding the chat limits, maintaining high-quality AI involves significant server costs, so we use subscriptions to keep the service running. For the content restrictions on specific family roles, we must follow Google Play’s strict safety policies to remain on the store.
reply_zh: 嗨！我们很高兴您喜欢 Fantasia。关于聊天限制，维持高质量的 AI 需要高昂的服务器成本，因此我们通过订阅制度来维持服务运行。对于特定家庭角色的内容限制，我们必须遵守 Google Play 严格的安全政策，以确保应用能在商店上架。
